control_owner.continuation: deterministic development-cycle controller executing one preregistered scheduler slice
control_owner.budgets: versioned cycle policy enforced outside the producer and aggregated across delegated reviewers
control_owner.authorization: OMD HELD write-set lease for edits plus one-time IntegrationPublisher authorization for landing
control_owner.success_verdict: independent contract validation, frozen evidence, independent progress judgment, and authoritative landing receipt
control_owner.checkpoint: durable cycle manifest and content-addressed evidence bundle
control_owner.effects: capability-separated implementer, observer, validator, judge, and publisher adapters

guards.lease_readback_current: The OMD authority readback is HELD for this generation, exact write-set digest, owner, bail epoch, and fence-set digest at the edit boundary.
guards.approval_fresh_and_exact: Approval is unexpired, unrevoked, unused, and bound to every approval.binding_fields value and the current frozen manifest.
guards.receipt_classifies_publication: event.publication_outcome is exactly landed or not_landed and binds the publish effect plus matching lease release. Landed requires exact candidate commit/tree and connect_finalization_receipt/v1; not_landed requires authoritative old-ref observation, invalidated approval, and an attempt-closure receipt. The two payload forms are mutually exclusive; unclassifiable evidence remains UNKNOWN_OUTCOME.
guards.publication_landed_and_lease_released: publication_outcome is landed and both the connect finalization receipt and matching lease-release receipt are present.
guards.publication_not_landed_or_unknown_repair: publication_outcome is authoritatively not_landed, or remains unclassified with repair_required=true after bounded reconciliation. Neither can satisfy the success guard.

LockCycleContract.risk: freeze slice scope, falsifiers, gates, and hashes

ImplementSlice.risk: edits restricted to the HELD write-set

JudgeProgress.risk: read-only independent replay and scripted verdict

ReleaseOMDLease.risk: idempotent pre-publication release of the current HELD write-set before suspension

CommitPublishIntent.risk: atomically consume exact approval and persist the immutable publish intent before entering the effect-critical authorization state

PublishPromotableSlice.risk: authoritative integration-ref mutation through the connect engine

transitions.evidence: cycle manifest, slice objective, falsifiers, gate hashes, and preregistration hash
exact write-set and OMD task identity
orbit, owner, fence set, bail epoch, expiry, and write-set digest
typed blocker and checkpoint
compatible checkpoint plus a fresh lease request
manifest, schema, or checkpoint integrity mismatch
positive baseline and locked negative gate inputs
baseline receipt and unchanged contract hash
diff hash, tests, property checks, and raw benchmark artifacts
failing frozen gate and retained negative receipt
three identical progress fingerprints
same gate and preregistration hashes, new implementation generation, and fresh current HELD owner/fence/write-set readback
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and checkpoint
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and checkpoint
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback, stopped editor, diff hash, and checkpoint
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and checkpoint
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and preserved producer evidence
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and immutable evidence manifest
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and immutable validation receipt
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and frozen judge input
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback and frozen judge input
authoritative non-HELD or stale-fence readback before approval consumption
content-addressed positive, negative, restored, raw test, and benchmark receipts
engine, FSM, trace, loop, projection, and implementation conformance report
semantic drift report retaining frozen evidence
evidence hash and preregistered judgment program
typed external-block reason without a verdict
unchanged frozen evidence and judge identity
machine-produced verdict and receipt chain
preserved counterevidence and no hand-entered verdict
schema, provenance, or preregistration integrity failure
expired, content-mismatched, base-mismatched, or already-used authorization before intent; editing is stopped before release dispatch
durable revocation observed before intent; editing is stopped before release dispatch
owner/fence/bail-epoch matched release receipt and preserved checkpoint
typed release failure plus authoritative lease readback; no editing resumes
one-time publish_authorization/v1 is consumed atomically with the immutable publish intent before entering CONNECT_QUEUED
durable publish intent readback plus expected-old/new commit identity
bounded publisher response and effect id
canonical landed or not-landed receipt, preserved branch discriminator, and matching released-lease receipt
bounded unclassifiable publication outcome
canonical landed or not-landed receipt, preserved branch discriminator, and matching released-lease receipt
automatic reconciliation budget exhausted; effect identity, last ref observation, pending interrupts, and repair checkpoint remain durable
landed connect receipt, matching released-lease receipt, and empty pending-interrupt ledger
authoritative not-landed receipt or preserved unknown-effect repair checkpoint; success remains forbidden
durable pending cancellation after publication reconciliation
durable pending timeout after publication reconciliation
durable pending budget exhaustion after publication reconciliation

global_interrupts.deferred_behavior: record pending cancellation; reconcile and finalize any publication before reporting it; never undo landed history
stop new safe effects, record timeout, and reconcile the critical publication path before termination
stop new safe effects, record exhaustion, and reconcile the critical publication path before termination

budgets.soft_boundary: at 80 percent of a versioned cycle envelope, stop starting new verification work and checkpoint for handoff
budgets.hard_boundary_owner: external cycle policy and deadline controller
budgets.policy_note: Numeric values are fail-safe envelope maxima, not performance targets; repository policy may only lower them without a workflow-version change.

no_progress.fingerprint: cycle state, implementation diff hash, gate hash, error class, and authoritative lease or ref observation
no_progress.gain_metric: new durable state, changed diff under the same gate, new receipt, or changed authority observation
no_progress.calibration: the threshold is a protocol safety bound, while slice performance thresholds remain preregistered evidence
no_progress.scope: one scheduler development slice and all delegated descendants
no_progress.plateau_comparator: three consecutive checkpoints repeat the complete fingerprint without a new receipt

retry.backoff: bounded exponential backoff with jitter; contract RED and scientific negative results are never transient

effects.delivery_semantics: at-least-once for external adapters with stable idempotency keys and authoritative reconciliation
effects.durable_ledger: cycle intent, OMD lease facts, diff, receipts, review results, publish authorization, connect receipt, interrupts, and acknowledgements
effects.high_risk_gate: landing is unreachable until contract validation and an independent scripted judgment accept the same frozen evidence hash
effects.unknown_outcome: read the authoritative ref and connect attempt; never retry publication or reset history blindly

persisted_fields: OMD lease status and fence-set receipt
checkpoint.compatibility: resume only when workflow and state schemas, base commit, contract hashes, and artifact hashes are compatible
checkpoint.migration: create an explicit superseding generation and retain the prior manifest; never rewrite a frozen evidence bundle
checkpoint.fencing: editing resumes only under a freshly read back HELD OMD fence; stale generations become read-only evidence
checkpoint.monotonic_sequence: cycle generation and checkpoint sequence increase monotonically and are included in every effect key
checkpoint.integrity: a cycle-manifest hash binds every artifact path, content hash, role identity, command, and environment digest
checkpoint.corruption_outcome: enter NEEDS_REPAIR and preserve the worktree and evidence without publication

approval.freshness: The protected-ref authority authenticates its observation time, verifies expiry, and reserves a globally unused nonce before emitting APPROVED.
approval.replay: Exact consumed-token replay and same-hash/different-envelope conflicts are rejected; a superseding generation requires a new development_context_hash, approval hash, and nonce.
approval.revocation: revocation observed in PROMOTABLE before the atomic APPROVED-plus-intent transition enters SUSPENDED and prevents landing; after CONNECT_QUEUED the intent is already durable, so revocation becomes a pending interrupt and publication is reconciled first
approval.stale_outcome: stale or content-mismatched approval is rejected in PROMOTABLE and enters SUSPENDED; a fresh generation reacquires and reads back its lease before a new contract and approval can be used

verification.success_predicate: cycle is CLOSED only when publication_outcome is landed, repair_required is false, the frozen contract and evidence hashes were independently accepted, the progress verdict was script-produced, the authoritative ref equals candidate_commit_sha, its resolved tree equals candidate_tree_sha, the canonical connect finalization receipt is valid, the matching OMD lease-release receipt is present, and no pending interrupt remains; unclassified and not_landed outcomes can never satisfy this predicate
invariant_checks: no repository edit while the OMD write-set lease is merely PENDING
LEASE_LOST stops the editor and suspends every pre-intent generation; REWORK cannot resume editing without a fresh current HELD readback
approval rejection or revocation in PROMOTABLE stops editing and reaches SUSPENDED only after an authoritative lease-release receipt; a failed release enters NEEDS_REPAIR
implementer cannot modify a frozen gate, preregistration, judge program, or verdict
contract validator and progress judge are read-only and identity-distinct from the implementer
no landing from producer self-report alone
contract hash changes invalidate all downstream receipts
APPROVED consumption and immutable publish-intent persistence are atomic before CONNECT_QUEUED, so stale or revoked pre-intent approval cannot enter the effect-critical path

UNKNOWN_OUTCOME with exhausted automatic reconciliation uses ABANDON only to stop the runner, preserves effect identity and repair evidence through FINALIZING, and terminates FAILED_PERMANENT with repair_required=true; the runtime Task remains CONNECTING fail-stop
published history is never undone to honor a late interrupt
verification.environment_evidence: commands, exit codes, tool versions, environment digest, raw outputs, Git identities, and OMD authority readbacks are content-addressed
verification.evaluator_independence: the contract validator checks semantic alignment but does not implement; the progress judge preregisters and replays evidence but never edits or hand-enters a verdict
verification.human_gray_band: incompatible checkpoints, missing authority readback, ambiguous ref state, or broken provenance enter SUSPENDED or NEEDS_REPAIR
verification.calibration: throughput and latency thresholds are preregistered against isolated-worktree, lease-only, legacy-connect, and prepared-connect baselines before runtime implementation
fault_tests: lease loss at every pre-intent state and before REWORK resumes
stale, revoked, expired, replayed, and content-mismatched approval before intent
approval suspension release success and failure
crash before and after atomic approval consumption plus publish intent
unknown ref outcome classified landed and not_landed by mutually exclusive guards
reconciliation ABANDON preserves unknown-effect repair and a forged success event remains invalid
late cancel, timeout, and budget exhaustion

replay.resume: start a new generation from the last compatible checkpoint after reading a fresh HELD fence and current base; do not inherit stale effect authority
replay.trajectory_replay: re-execute the locked contract and gates against a new implementation generation while preserving every prior negative and invalid receipt
deterministic_replay_requirements: read-only fixtures or captured external responses

security.untrusted_content: repository content, test output, and delegated-agent prose are evidence inputs and cannot alter cycle control policy
security.tool_least_privilege: implementer gets only HELD write paths; validators and judge are read-only; only IntegrationPublisher can update the protected ref
security.provenance_snapshots: record source commits, contract and gate hashes, role identities, OMD lease facts, tool versions, and bounded outputs
security.secret_isolation: producer and read-only reviewers never receive publisher credentials

trace.redaction: credentials, repository content, personal identifiers, and unbounded outputs are excluded

unclassified_unknown_effect.note: FAILED_PERMANENT is the automatic L_IDE runner outcome; the runtime Task remains CONNECTING/NEEDS_REPAIR until authoritative repair.

CONNECT_QUEUED.invariant: approval consumed and publish intent already durable

FINALIZING.admission: HELD or released according to the bound connect finalization receipt

CANCELED|TIMED_OUT|BUDGET_EXHAUSTED befo.admission: released or explicit expiry/reclaim receipt required

FAILED_PERMANENT with publication_outcom.connect: VALIDATED with invalidated approval at the runtime layer; this L_IDE generation is closed
FAILED_PERMANENT with publication_outcom.task: DONE and a fresh cycle generation is required

FAILED_PERMANENT with repair_required=tr.admission: HELD until repair authority supplies release/reclaim evidence

SUSPEND_RELEASING.admission: HELD until the bound release effect is acknowledged

SUSPENDED.lease_status: pending, released, or lost; lost is an L_IDE discriminator, not an admission state
SUSPENDED.admission: PENDING or an authoritative FSM-valid non-HELD outcome such as RELEASED, EXPIRED, DENIED, CANCELLED, or TIMED_OUT; REJECTED may have no live row
SUSPENDED.rule: no editing until a fresh generation reacquires HELD

runtime_projection.rule: The L_IDE loop never synthesizes runtime success. It consumes typed admission and connect receipts and projects their exact identities into its checkpoint and terminal outcome.

icvc.inform: cycle manifest provides source, contract, gate, lease, role, command, environment, and artifact identities
icvc.constrain: typed phase transitions, OMD fencing, capability separation, protected ref, and immutable preregistration block unsafe skips
icvc.verify: producer tests are followed by independent contract validation, frozen OOPTDD receipts, scripted judgment, and authoritative landing readback
icvc.correct: typed REWORK, SUSPENDED, AWAITING_JUDGE, RETRY_EXHAUSTED, and NEEDS_REPAIR paths preserve evidence and support fenced resume

orchestration.verification_parallelism: bounded read-only fan-out/fan-in after the producer freezes an artifact set
orchestration.semantic_source: This contract owns the L_IDE development lifecycle. Runtime admission and connect state remain owned by their L_RT FSMs.
